// src/data/initialData.js

export const initialStaff = [
  { id: 1, name: "Prof. Nishad Patel", subject: "Mathematics", department: "Science", email: "meera@college.edu", role: "teacher" },
  { id: 2, name: "Prof. Chandrashekhar Bhamare", subject: "Physics", department: "Science", email: "rahul@college.edu", role: "teacher" },
  { id: 3, name: "Prof. Ratna Patil", subject: "Chemistry", department: "Science", email: "sunita@college.edu", role: "teacher" },
  { id: 4, name: "Prof. Chaitali Patil", subject: "English", department: "Arts", email: "amit@college.edu", role: "teacher" },
  { id: 5, name: "Prof. Aishwarya Patil", subject: "History", department: "Arts", email: "priya@college.edu", role: "teacher" },
  { id: 6, name: "Prof. Niket Sharma", subject: "Computer Science", department: "Technology", email: "vijay@college.edu", role: "teacher" },
  { id: 7, name: "Dr. Nived", subject: "Biology", department: "Science", email: "anita@college.edu", role: "teacher" },
];

// Timetable: staffId -> [ { day, period, class } ]
export const initialTimetable = {
  1: [ // Meera Joshi - Mathematics
    { day: "Monday", period: 1, class: "11A", time: "8:00-9:00" },

export const DAYS = ["Monday", "Tuesday", "Wednesday", "Thursday", "Friday"];
export const PERIODS = [1, 2, 3, 4];
export const PERIOD_TIMES = {
  1: "8:00 - 9:00",
  2: "9:00 - 10:00",
  3: "10:00 - 11:00",
  4: "11:00 - 12:00",
};
